# 2026-04-30 TB-2 charter (active) — "P1/P3 Runtime Boundary Closure + RSP-1". Goal: real WorkTx traverses Sequencer::dispatch_transition; accepted → canonical L4 (transition_ledger + LedgerWriter, NOT economy::ledger::AcceptedLedger which stays a TB-1 primitive); rejected → L4.E with submit_id; RSP-1 admission via WorkTx.stake>0 + seeded EconomicState escrow. STEP_B-protected target: src/state/sequencer.rs. Forbidden Day-1: ledger I/O inside dispatch_transition; new TypedTx variants; non-empty exempt_tx_kinds at runtime; P5/P6/h_vppu work; AcceptedLedger as production accepted spine. Charter: handover/tracer_bullets/TB-2_charter_2026-04-30.md. STEP_B preflight: handover/ai-direct/TB-2_SEQUENCER_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_2026-04-30.md.

Five atoms (d9df271 SubmissionEnvelope plumbing → 1b8bae5 WorkTx pure validation → e9de97a apply_one rejection-writer + I3-I8 → deea6a1 accepted canonical L4 + I1, I2, I9-I12 → cf32735 replay invariant + I13). 16/16 acceptance battery green (3 in-crate U1-U3 + 13 integration I1-I13). # 2026-04-30 TB-3 charter v2 + STEP_B Phase-0 preflight v1 — "P3 RSP-1 Formal Tx Surface (WP-canonical)". Goal: 2 new TypedTx variants (TaskOpenTx + EscrowLockTx) on canonical L4; bridge at sequencer.rs:197-215 deleted; WorkTx admission becomes structural (task_markets_t[task_id].total_escrow > 0 + balances_t[agent] >= work.stake); accepted WorkTx commits stake (balances_t debit + stakes_t insert per WP § 14.1 + § 18 Inv 5 lock-on-accept); rejected WorkTx leaves economic_state_t bit-identical (L4.E never mutates economic state per user verdict #14). # 2026-04-30 TB-5 SHIPPED — merged at 1bdc55a (--no-ff merge of experiment/tb5-rsp3-resolution-gate into main). Eight atoms (4c3414e Atom 1 STEP_B preflight → 66f559e Atom 1.5 round-2 remediation → b9de549 Atom 1.6 round-3 doc-fix → c415cd2 round-4 self-verification fallback → 42fd45c Atom 2 substrate ingress → 4a33b1a Atom 3 ABI → 9ff8179 Atom 4 emit_system_tx + apply_one stage 1.5 → 06a7fcf Atom 5 ChallengeResolve dispatch arm → c7dfef9 Atom 6 UpheldDeferred + boundary tests → cc72d61 Atom 7 replay + property + anti-drift CI → 2fb4ed9 Atom 8 recursive audit + 真题烟测). **617/617 cargo test --workspace passing** (corrected 2026-05-01 per `handover/audits/SELF_AUDIT_TB_5_SMOKE_TAPE_2026-05-01.md` § 2 — original ship-time figure of 464 was bare `cargo test` count without --workspace; net delta from TB-4 baseline 571 = 46 new TB-5 tests). Production claim adds: "TuringOS runtime kernel structurally enforces Anti-Oreo agent-vs-system ingress separation. Agent ingress (submit_agent_tx) rejects 4 system-emitted variants pre-queue with SubmitError::SystemTxForbiddenOnAgentIngress. System ingress (emit_system_tx) constructs + signs system-emitted TypedTx structs INTERNALLY with the runtime's Ed25519Keypair; defense-in-depth verification at apply_one stage 1.5 re-checks signatures against PinnedSystemPubkeys. ChallengeResolve dispatch arm enforces idempotent single-shot resolution: Released refunds challenger bond (entry preserved); UpheldDeferred is marker-only with bond preserved for TB-6 RSP-3.2 slash routing. CTF conserved across mixed Released + UpheldDeferred sequences; 9-sub-field EconomicState invariant + 5-holding CTF preserved." Audit trail: STEP_B Phase-0 r1+r2+r3 (Codex round-2 4 CHALLENGE → 1.5 amendments; round-3 2 CHALLENGE → 1.6 doc-fix; round-4 Codex agent infra failure → self-verification fallback). Codex-only audit mode per `2026-04-30_TB5_audit_mode_supplement.md` (Gemini strategic-tier MODEL_CAPACITY_EXHAUSTED).

# 2026-05-01 TB-6 ACTIVE — "P2 Agent Runtime: Production ChainTape Wire-up". Architect ruling 2026-05-01 (`handover/directives/2026-05-01_TB6_ARCHITECT_RULING.md`) selected Path A (P2 Agent Runtime / Production ChainTape Wire-up) over Path B (RSP-3.2 Slash) per D1. 7 binding decisions ruled: D1 Path A; D2 chain-backed smoke = HARD requirement from TB-6; D3 hybrid-by-risk audit (TB-6 = production wire-up class → Codex impl + Gemini arch with degraded fallback); D4 `cargo test --workspace` canonical with mandated reporting shape; D5 historical "smoke tape" → "smoke evidence" rename (tape only for ledger chain); D6 5 memory updates approved; D7 NO constitution amendment (this is roadmap/testing-platform gap, not constitutional). Goal: at least one LLM-driven run traverses rtool/context → Agent proposal → WorkTx → Sequencer::apply_one → LedgerWriter::commit → on-disk ChainTape → replay/verify_chain/reconstruct, producing ≥1 accepted L4 + ≥1 rejected L4.E entries with valid system_signature + parent_ledger_root chain + CAS payload linkage + agent audit trail (proposal CIDs only; NO chain-of-thought). 8 atoms per ruling § 3.6: Atom 0 charter+naming cleanup → Atom 1 production runtime repo bootstrap (RuntimeChaintapeConfig; bus.rs + main.rs; STEP_B preflight) → Atom 2 evaluator → Sequencer adapter → Atom 3 chain-backed smoke run (mathd_algebra_107) → Atom 4 verify_chaintape CLI → Atom 5 agent audit trail → Atom 6 fork visibility → Atom 7 audit + ship. Forbidden: SlashTx, NodeMarket/RSP-M, AMM, P6 expansion, MetaTape, public chain, new TypedTx variants, new state-root domains, new monetary cascade, agent chain-of-thought broadcast/persistence, calling pre-TB-6 paper trail "smoke tape"/"chaintape"/"tape", Gemini-degraded-mode label-omission. Charter: handover/tracer_bullets/TB-6_charter_2026-05-01.md. STEP_B preflight (deferred to Atom 1): handover/ai-direct/TB-6_PRODUCTION_CHAINTAPE_BOOTSTRAP_2026-05-01.md.

# 2026-05-01 TB-7 ACTIVE — "P2 Frame B: Per-LLM-Proposal WorkTx Routing". Architect ruling 2026-05-01 (`handover/directives/2026-05-01_TB7_ARCHITECT_RULING.md`) re-classifies TB-6 as Frame A only (Frame B: RED) and authorizes TB-7 as Frame B = per-LLM-proposal WorkTx routing through bus.submit_typed_tx as **AUTHORITATIVE** path (NOT "also emit"). 5 binding decisions ruled: D1 Option A (Frame B; legacy bus.append must be removed / ChainTape-projected / shadow_only-annotated — "also emit" forbidden); D2 run-local Ed25519 keypair with `run-local identity, not durable reputation identity` caveat; D3 narrowed OMEGA scope (WorkTx + VerifyTx; ChallengeWindow OPEN; no FinalizeRewardTx; no SlashTx); D4 ChainDerivedRunFacts (renamed from chain-derived PPUT; bit-exact on §4.4 structural field set: solved/verified/tx_count/proposal_count/golden_path_token_count/gp_payload/gp_path/gp_proof_file/tactic_diversity/tool_dist/failed_branch_count; time-sensitive fields excluded); D5 production wire-up Class 2 audit (Codex impl + Gemini arch with degraded fallback) + new ProposalTelemetry CAS atom (Atom 1.5). 7 ship gates: Gate 1 authoritative path; Gate 2 chain_proposal_count==evaluator_proposal_count; Gate 3 ≥1 L4 + ≥1 L4.E (forced rejection allowed only with forced_rejection_for_gate_3=true label); Gate 4 agent + system signature verification; Gate 5 ProposalTelemetry CAS retrievability per WorkTx.proposal_cid; Gate 6 chain-derived run facts == evaluator structural facts; Gate 7 legacy bypass regression test (repo-wide grep + shadow_only annotation enforced). Goal: every meaningful LLM proposal -> WorkTx/VerifyTx -> bus.submit_typed_tx (authoritative) -> Sequencer::apply_one -> L4 or L4.E -> CAS-linked ProposalTelemetry -> replay-verifiable ChainDerivedRunFacts. 8 atoms: Atom 0 charter ratification + ARCHITECT_RULING archive + memory updates -> Atom 1 src/runtime/agent_keypairs.rs + agent_pubkeys.json -> Atom 1.5 src/runtime/proposal_telemetry.rs (NEW per D5) -> Atom 2 evaluator append-branch authoritative routing -> Atom 3 evaluator OMEGA-branch routing -> Atom 4 verify_chaintape extension (agent-sig + ProposalTelemetry CAS lookup) -> Atom 5 src/runtime/chain_derived_run_facts.rs (renamed per D4) -> Atom 6 chain-backed real-LLM smoke on mathd_algebra_107 -> Atom 7 audit + ship. Forbidden additions #21-30 inherited; +#31 legacy bus.append as authoritative state mutation; +#32 calling Atom 5 output "chain-derived PPUT"; +#33 forced rejection without label. Post-TB-7 sequencing override (charter §13; supersedes TB-6 ruling §4.5): TB-8 audit dashboard -> TB-9 minimal payout (FinalizeRewardTx single-solver/single-verifier/no-royalty/no-DAG/no-NodeMarket) -> TB-10 beta launch (narrow Lean problem set, real ChainTape + replay + escrow/payout) -> TB-11 NodeMarket v0 (FirstLong/Short positions + PriceIndex v0; NOT tradable) -> TB-12+ Polymarket-like full market. NodeMarket trading / AMM / public chain / MetaTape / multi-org / full RSP-4 settlement / royalty / long-term reputation / P6 PPUT research expansion / h_vppu polish DEFERRED post-MVP per ruling §6. 2 new memory rules: feedback_risk_class_audit (Class 0–4 audit standard) + feedback_launch_priority (MVP-vertical-slice over NodeMarket). Charter: handover/tracer_bullets/TB-7_charter_2026-05-01.md (renamed from _draft_ at ratification).

Atom 5 (agent audit trail): src/runtime/agent_audit_trail.rs with AgentProposalRecord (9 fields per architect spec) + AcceptedOrRejected enum + CAS storage + AgentAuditTrailIndex JSONL with prev_hash→hash chain + I91/I91b/I91d (I91d structural witness blocks future schema migrations from adding chain_of_thought / model_deliberation / tool_transcript / raw_prompt / raw_completion / internal_reasoning fields). Atom 6 (RunSummary): src/runtime/run_summary.rs aggregator + src/bin/gen_run_summary.rs CLI + I92/I92b/I92c; run_summary.json on smoke evidence shows 1 accepted tx_id + 1 rejected tx_id + 2 candidate proposal CIDs. Self-audit: handover/audits/RECURSIVE_AUDIT_TB_6_2026-05-01.md (7/7 architect D1-D7 + 7/7 charter § 4 decision blocks + 20/20 charter § 6 forbidden lines + 3/3 § 8 ship proofs all GREEN); audit label `degraded` (Gemini strategic-tier MODEL_CAPACITY_EXHAUSTED per TB-5 supplement precedent; Codex round-1+2 applied at Atom 1 STEP_B preflight; final Codex impl audit on full TB-6 diff recommended as TB-7 follow-up but non-blocking per charter § 9 + ruling D3 hybrid-by-risk). 5-TB ChainTape production debt CLOSED. Production claim adds: "TuringOS production binary drives the runtime kernel through Sequencer::apply_one to on-disk ChainTape (refs/transitions/main commit chain + cas/ + rejections.jsonl chain-hashed). Replay verifier reconstructs QState + EconomicState from L4 alone via replay_full_transition (CO1.7-impl A4 I-DETHASH witness). Agent audit trail records what the Agent saw + submitted + how the system judged, NOT chain-of-thought (structurally enforced by JSON-grep witness). RunSummary aggregates proposal-level fork visibility. The kernel claims TB-1..TB-5 made are now verifiable from on-disk artifacts produced by an LLM-driven run, not only from cargo test --workspace in-memory state."
